name: Hummus (Chick Pea Dip)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Chick peas, drained (canned or fresh cooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chick peas, tahina, lemon juice, garlic, salt and cumin in a food processor.
2. Mix until smooth.
3. Transfer the mixture to a jar and refrigerate.
4. Just before serving, sprinkle chopped parsley on top.
5. If desired, add more garlic or adjust the thickness by adding more lemon juice.
